name: Frontend Spec Agent
description: Designs the UI component tree, routing, and state management. Participates in the hard-barrier sync with the backend before the integration step.

checks.prompt: Design a minimal React frontend component tree for the app boilerplate. List: (1) 4 page components with their route paths. (2) 3 shared UI components. (3) suggested state management approach.
Define the frontend routing configuration and main App.tsx structure. List the routes and their corresponding components. Context: {retryContext}
